summary:
Fixed race-condition bug that allowed duplicate transfers.

Key changes in app/processor.py:

1. Wrap entire transfer in a single BEGIN IMMEDIATE SQLite transaction so no other writer can interleave operations.

2. Insert a placeholder row with the idempotency key at the start of the transaction. A concurrent request with the same key now hits the UNIQUE-constraint immediately, exits as “duplicate”, and never touches account balances.

3. Perform debit/credit, mark the placeholder row as “success”, then commit. Any error rolls everything back.

Result: running test.sh now prints PASS (balances A=500, B=1500; total conserved).
